name: Intel Core i5 14400F 14th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i5 14400F 14th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i5 14400F 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i5 14400F 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.52,500. This 14th Gen CPU offers 10 cores (6 Performance + 4 Efficient) and 16 threads with boost clock speeds up to around 4.7 GHz, giving solid performance for gaming and everyday multitasking, and it requires a discrete GPU since it has no integrated graphics. Designed for the LGA 1700 platform, it supports both DDR4 and DDR
